lines.speaker: Juatil
lines.text: Hello there. What do you need?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What do you do around here?

lines.speaker: Juatil
lines.text: I mostly look after the lab equipment and make sure things run as they should.

lines.speaker: Juatil
lines.text: These days, I'm not much into the production side of things... All that moving up and down, pulling levers, carrying vials... These old bones ain't what they used to be.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thanks! I'd better be going now.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: You alchemists sure wear a lot of safety gear.

lines.speaker: Juatil
lines.text: Of course! Some of the mixtures down here can get pretty nasty in their raw form. Safety first!

lines.speaker: Juatil
lines.text: Although between you and me... I'm not sure if anything this lab produces can be considered truly safe for human consumption.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yikes! I guess I'll not be trying anything then!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thanks! I'd better be going now.
